name: Brioche1
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and salt together; set aside.
2. Dissolve sugar in warm water in a large mixing bowl.
3. Add yeast to the dissolved sugar mixture and stir slowly until dissolved.
4. Gradually add flour and salt mixture on top of the sugar and yeast mixture.
5. Incorporate 6 eggs into the flour mixture.
6. Mix slowly until all ingredients are combined.
7. Stir the mixture several minutes until the dough becomes smooth and elastic.
8. Add softened butter, 2 tablespoons at a time, until all is completely incorporated.
9. Cover and let the dough proof until doubled in volume.
10. Punch down the dough and refrigerate until firm and workable.
11. Divide into 3-ounce portions of dough.
12. Brush oven-proof coffee cups with softened butter.
13. Pinch a marble-sized piece of dough from each portion and reserve.
14. Form each portion of dough into a round shape, placing it in the buttered cup.
15. Form each marble-sized piece of dough into a pear shape.
16. Make a dent (see Part 2).
